name: carbon-footprint-platform
description: AI-powered Carbon Footprint Awareness Platform for tracking and reducing environmental impact

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.test: concurrently "cd server && npm test" "cd client && npm test -- --watchAll=false"
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd server && npm run lint" "cd client && npm run lint"
scripts.format: concurrently "cd server && npm run format" "cd client && npm run format"

author: Developer
